title: 2. Needle JianZhong 肩中 (44.06) 再针对侧肩中。
text:
Needling SiMa for numbness of the legs is effective. Besides, JianZhong on the healthy side can also be selected.
ShenGuan is also effective. In severe case, bleed ShuangFeng (DT.05). Bleeding this point may treat numbness of
the hands and feet. If needling XiaSanHuang (77.18, 19, 21) is added on the leg, the therapeutic effect is better.
